name: @forgeax/hello-sprite-lit
description: Sprite-lit demo: forgeax::sprite-lit material lit by 1 directional + 1 point + 1 spot light (feat-20260624-sprite-lit-shading-model-pure-2d-lighting M1').

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT. hello-sprite-lit exercises the sprite-lit material end-to-end (forgeax::sprite-lit + Half-Lambert squared + DirectionalLight/PointLight/SpotLight via punctual storage buffers) with a single procedural-color sprite scene (plan-decisions L-2 procedural sprite, hardcoded 1 dir + 1 point + 1 spot light config).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-app + @forgeax/engine-shader sizes already tracked at the package level; demo workspace declares no separate bundle-size baseline

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-app gates; sprite-lit perf is bounded by 1 sprite + 3 lights (URP cap 4) and falls under hello-pbr-style lighting cost already gated by transparent-sort.bench.ts (sprite-lit reuses the same splitLdrSprite sub-pass per plan-strategy D-4)

bench.reason: perf-critical bench (per-light forward shading) is anchored at @forgeax/engine-runtime; sprite-lit reuses the same lighting buffer pipeline as PBR -- no demo-level bench

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M1' acceptance demo for the 4th sprite shading model id (requirements section 2 #11)
